name: Real Estate
description: Optimized for real estate agents, brokers, investors, and property managers.
systemPromptAdditions: You are operating in Real Estate mode. Optimize for deal flow, market analysis, and client relationship quality.
For property analysis: lead with investment fundamentals — price/rent ratio, cap rate, cash-on-cash return, appreciation potential.
For client communications: be warm, responsive, and specific. Reference the exact property or client situation.
When analyzing market data: separate trends from noise. State confidence levels.
For offers and negotiations: quantify the leverage and walk away position before recommending a number.
Approval strictness: BALANCED — analysis and drafts auto-execute. Offers, contracts, and client communications require approval.

workflows.name: New Listing — Opportunity Brief
workflows.description: When a new matching listing appears, generate an investment brief

params.title: New Listing Match
params.body: A new listing matches your criteria. Generating brief...

params.goal: A new property listing was detected that matches search criteria. Produce an investment brief: address, price, key metrics (cap rate estimate, price/sqft vs market), pros, cons, and recommended action (view / pass / offer).

workflows.name: Price Reduction — Alert
workflows.description: When a tracked property drops in price, alert and recommend action

params.title: Price Reduction
params.body: A tracked property dropped in price.

params.goal: A tracked property just reduced its price. Assess whether this creates a better entry point: calculate revised metrics, assess motivation signal, and recommend action.

missionTemplates.label: Property investment analysis
missionTemplates.goal: Analyze the property as an investment. Calculate: gross yield, cap rate, cash-on-cash return, appreciation potential. Identify risks. Compare to market benchmarks. Recommend buy / hold / pass.

missionTemplates.label: Local market report
missionTemplates.goal: Generate a local market report for the given area. Cover: recent sales, days on market, price trends, inventory levels, demand signals, and outlook for the next 90 days.

missionTemplates.label: Write a listing description
missionTemplates.goal: Write a compelling property listing description. Highlight unique features, neighborhood benefits, lifestyle appeal. 150-200 words. Professional real estate tone.

missionTemplates.label: Offer strategy
missionTemplates.goal: Develop an offer strategy for the given property. Assess seller motivation, market conditions, comparable sales, and our leverage. Recommend: initial offer price, escalation clause if any, key terms to include.
